mapper.select: SELECT fsr.id, fsr.stealerId AS stealerId, fsr.plantRecordId AS plantRecordId, fsr.cropId AS cropId, fsr.stolenTime AS stolenTime, fsr.expGained AS expGained, fsr.coinGained AS coinGained, fu.nickname AS stealerNickname, fu.avatar AS stealerAvatar, fc.name AS cropName FROM farm_steal_record fsr LEFT JOIN farm_user fu ON fsr.stealerId = fu.id LEFT JOIN farm_crop fc ON fsr.cropId = fc.id WHERE fsr.ownerId = #{ownerId} ORDER BY fsr.stolenTime DESC
